rowFilter.pos_sales.tax_rate_snapshot.description: R5b GAP-O4: IVA rate snapshot at sale creation. Reports use this column, NOT the live tenant_settings.tax_rate, so historical sales remain auditable when owner changes the tax rate.

rowFilter.pos_companies.plan_changed_at.name: plan_changed_at
rowFilter.pos_companies.plan_changed_at.description: R5b GAP-O5: when the SaaS plan was last changed. Frontend uses this to show "feature deprecated" banners when downgrading.

rowFilter.pos_payment_pending_reconcilia.name: expected_arrival_at
rowFilter.pos_payment_pending_reconcilia.description: R10e-A FIX-N5-A2: timestamp esperado de arribo del pago al banco. Cron polea hasta expires_at.

rowFilter.pos_payment_pending_reconcilia.name: source
rowFilter.pos_payment_pending_reconcilia.description: R10e-A FIX-N5-A2: psp | external_app | manual. external_app marca pagos por app bancaria (BBVA, Banamex, Santander, OXXO, etc).

rowFilter.inventory_movements.reverses_i.name: reverses_id
rowFilter.inventory_movements.reverses_i.description: If set, this movement is the inverse of inventory_movements.id=reverses_id. Used to correct mistakes WITHOUT deleting the original (audit trail intact).

rowFilter.pos_users.allowed_hours_overri.name: allowed_hours_override
rowFilter.pos_users.allowed_hours_overri.description: R10c-A FIX-N3-1: override per-user del business_hours del tenant. Mismo formato. NULL = usa tenant default.

rowFilter.pos_users.business_type.name: business_type
rowFilter.pos_users.business_type.description: Giro de negocio (cafeteria, ropa, etc.) — usado en bootstrap demo

rowFilter.pos_users.must_change_password.name: must_change_password
rowFilter.pos_users.must_change_password.description: Forzar cambio de contraseña en próximo login (password temporal)

rowFilter.pos_user_session_invalidations.name: reason
rowFilter.pos_user_session_invalidations.description: Free-text reason: permissions_changed | role_changed | password_reset | manual_force_logout

rowFilter.tenant_settings.session_timeou.name: session_timeout_min
rowFilter.tenant_settings.session_timeou.description: R8b FIX-R3: minutos de inactividad antes de auto-logout en cliente. 0 = desactivado. Default 15.

rowFilter.tenant_settings.business_hours.name: business_hours
rowFilter.tenant_settings.business_hours.description: R10c-A FIX-N3-1: horario laboral. Formato: {"timezone":"America/Mexico_City","schedule":{"mon":{"open":"08:00","close":"22:00"},"tue":{...},"wed":{...},"thu":{...},"fri":{...},"sat":{...},"sun":null}}. NULL = 24/7 sin restricción.

rowFilter.pos_customers.deleted_at.name: deleted_at
rowFilter.pos_customers.deleted_at.description: Soft-delete timestamp. NULL = active. Set by DELETE /api/customers/:id; cleared by POST /api/customers/:id/restore.

rowFilter.pos_customers.deleted_by_user_.name: deleted_by_user_id
rowFilter.pos_customers.deleted_by_user_.description: User id (pos_users.id) that triggered the soft-delete.

rowFilter.trial_signups.phone_verified.name: phone_verified
rowFilter.trial_signups.phone_verified.description: Phase 3: true if user verified phone via SMS/WhatsApp OTP

rowFilter.trial_signups.email_verified.name: email_verified
rowFilter.trial_signups.email_verified.description: Phase 3: true if user verified email via OTP or Google OAuth

rowFilter.trial_signups.osint_data.name: osint_data
rowFilter.trial_signups.osint_data.description: Phase 3: JSON payload with OSINT results the user confirmed at signup

rowFilter.trial_signups.osint_results_co.name: osint_results_count
rowFilter.trial_signups.osint_results_co.description: Phase 3: number of OSINT results confirmed at signup (for quick analytics)

rowFilter.pos_outgoing_messages_log.stat.name: status
rowFilter.pos_outgoing_messages_log.stat.description: pending=encolado, pending_provider=keys no set, sent=ok, failed=rechazo provider, bounced=bounce/webhook.

rowFilter.pos_outgoing_messages_log.next.name: next_retry_at
rowFilter.pos_outgoing_messages_log.next.description: Timestamp en el que el cron POST /api/messaging/retry-failed debe re-intentar este mensaje. NULL si ya está en sent/bounced.

rowFilter.cloud_backups.type.name: type
rowFilter.cloud_backups.type.description: full = dump completo; incremental = WAL/diff desde ultimo full

rowFilter.cloud_backups.location.name: location
rowFilter.cloud_backups.location.description: URL https publica/firmada del objeto remoto

rowFilter.inventory_counts.locked_by_use.name: locked_by_user_id
rowFilter.inventory_counts.locked_by_use.description: User holding the in_progress/paused lock for this (tenant,area).

rowFilter.inventory_counts.locked_at.name: locked_at
rowFilter.inventory_counts.locked_at.description: Timestamp when this count took the (tenant,area) lock.
